rationale: The proposed change concerns Tax Code §11.13(b) homestead exemption amounts. Elec. Code §254.063 governs candidate campaign finance reporting schedules. The two provisions address unrelated subjects and do not interact.
quote: Sec. 254.063. SEMIANNUAL REPORTING SCHEDULE FOR CANDIDATE. (a) A candidate shall file two reports for each year as provided by this section.
_note: No relationship between proposed homestead exemption change and election code reporting schedule.
